question: Transformer T-015 shows rising load and intermittent over-temperature alerts. Investigate recent sensor behavior, infer probable fault mode, estimate short-term risk over 30 days, and issue a maintenance work order recommendation.
effective_question: Transformer T-015 shows rising load and intermittent over-temperature alerts. Investigate recent sensor behavior, infer probable fault mode, estimate short-term risk over 30 days, and issue a maintenance work order recommendation.
answer: Based on the results, the probable fault mode for Transformer T-015 is Low-Temperature Overheating (< 300°C) (FM-002), as indicated by the rising load and intermittent over-temperature alerts, anomalous sensor readings for winding temperature, and dissolved gas analysis results. The estimated short-term risk over 30 days is high, with a projected Remaining Useful Life (RUL) of approximately 24 days. A maintenance work order has been issued with a recommended action to reduce load and inspect the transformer within 30 days.

raw_plan.task: List all Smart Grid transformer assets with health status
raw_plan.expected_output: List of dicts with keys: transformer_id, name, location, health_status, rul_days, in_service

raw_plan.task: Get full nameplate and status metadata for transformer T-015
raw_plan.expected_output: Dict with keys: transformer_id, name, manufacturer, location, voltage_class, rating_kva, install_date, age_years, health_status, fdd_category, rul_days, in_service

raw_plan.task: List all sensor IDs available for transformer T-015
raw_plan.expected_output: List of dicts with keys: sensor_id, unit, num_readings

raw_plan.task: Get time-series readings for sensor load_current_a on transformer T-015
raw_plan.expected_output: List of dicts with keys: timestamp, value, unit

raw_plan.task: Get time-series readings for sensor winding_temp_top_c on transformer T-015
raw_plan.expected_output: List of dicts with keys: timestamp, value, unit

raw_plan.task: Detect anomalous sensor readings for sensor winding_temp_top_c on transformer T-015
raw_plan.expected_output: Dict with keys: transformer_id, sensor_id, total_readings, anomaly_count, anomaly_rate_pct, anomalies

raw_plan.task: Compute the trend (slope) of sensor winding_temp_top_c readings on transformer T-015
raw_plan.expected_output: Dict with keys: transformer_id, sensor_id, num_readings, start_time, end_time, mean_value, min_value, max_value, slope_per_day, direction, r_squared
List of matching failure mode dicts

raw_plan.task: Get the sensors and gases most strongly associated with the failure mode
raw_plan.expected_output: Dict with keys: failure_mode_id, name, key_gases, description, iec_code, recommended_action

raw_plan.task: Retrieve the most recent dissolved gas analysis (DGA) record for transformer T-015
raw_plan.expected_output: Dict with gas concentrations (ppm) and the recorded fault label

raw_plan.task: Classify a set of dissolved gas concentrations into a fault type using the IEC 60599 Rogers Ratio method
raw_plan.expected_output: Dict with keys: transformer_id, iec_code, diagnosis, r1_ch4_h2, r2_c2h2_c2h4, r3_c2h4_c2h6, input_gases

raw_plan.task: Project the RUL forward by 30 days using a linear degradation model
raw_plan.expected_output: Dict with keys: transformer_id, current_rul_days, forecast_date, projected_rul_days, projected_health_index, confidence, method

raw_plan.expected_output: Dict with keys: transformer_id, severity, fault_type, estimated_min_hours, estimated_max_hours, estimated_typical_hours, source

raw_plan.expected_output: Dict with keys: work_order_id, transformer_id, issue_description, priority, fault_type, status, estimated_downtime_hours, created_at, assigned_technician

scenario.text: Transformer T-015 shows rising load and intermittent over-temperature alerts. Investigate recent sensor behavior, infer probable fault mode, estimate short-term risk over 30 days, and issue a maintenance work order recommendation.
scenario.characteristic_form: The answer should show a multi-step workflow: summarize relevant IoT evidence, map to likely fault mode, provide a 30-day risk or forecast statement, and conclude with a concrete work-order recommendation.
